description_long: This object is a classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) console, characterized by its rectangular, boxy shape and two-tone color scheme of light gray and dark gray. The front panel features the iconic 'Nintendo Entertainment System' branding in red, along with two rectangular buttons and two controller ports. The top surface has a large, ribbed section for the cartridge slot cover, and the sides are mostly plain with some venting and connection ports. The back and side panels include additional ports for power and AV connections, as well as ventilation slots. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, with a hard plastic exterior and minimal decorative elements, making it instantly recognizable as a vintage home gaming console.
description: A vintage Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) console with a boxy, two-tone gray design, front buttons, and controller ports. The exterior is hard plastic with minimal decoration and clear branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Nintendo branding, two rectangular buttons, and two controller ports.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain back panel with two small ports and ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the power and AV connection ports and additional venting.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with a mostly plain surface and some venting at the bottom edge.
